questions.text: Have you ever ghosted someone to avoid an awkward conversation?
Have you ever pretended not to see someone you know in public?
Have you ever lied about your age to get a discount?
Have you ever stolen something and never got caught?
Have you ever broken something at a friend's house and not told them?
Have you ever read someone's messages without permission?
Have you ever blamed a fart on a pet or a child?
Have you ever faked being sick to get out of work?
Have you ever cried to get out of a speeding ticket?
Have you ever returned a worn outfit for a full refund?
Have you ever eaten food off the floor and said nothing?

Have you ever sent a text about someone to that exact person by mistake?
Have you ever pretended to love a gift you secretly hated?
Have you ever lied about reading a book to sound smart?

Have you ever re-gifted a present to the person who gave it to you?

Have you ever cheated on a test or exam?

Have you ever quietly left a group chat to escape the drama?
Have you ever judged someone entirely on their shoes?

Have you ever kept money you found that wasn't yours?

Have you ever taken something from a hotel room that wasn't a toiletry?
Have you ever let someone else take the blame for something you did?
Would you rather win $50,000 yourself or watch your best friend win $500,000?
Would you rather have your search history made public or your bank statement?
Would you rather lose all your photos or all your contacts?
Would you rather never be able to lie or never be able to keep a secret?
Would you rather have your texts read aloud at this table or your camera roll shown?
Would you rather date someone with no sense of humour or no ambition?
Would you rather marry a billionaire you don't love or your soulmate who's broke?
Would you rather know how you die or when you die?
Would you rather your partner read your mind for a day or your messages for a year?
Would you rather be famous for something embarrassing or never be remembered at all?
Would you rather your ex or your boss saw your search history?
Would you rather date someone exactly like your ex or exactly like your parent?
Would you rather everyone knew your weight or your number of exes?
